title: Midnight Discord
description: A mod powered by Discord JDA & Discord Webhooks to integrate your Discord and Minecraft servers into one.
body:
![Discord Integration Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833ac689035b2c4381b94736fcb53131e413c8b4.png)
Midnight Discord is a server-side integration for Discord. It allows messages to be sent back and forth from Minecraft to Discord and back.

Note: to use this mod you have to go through the [Discord Developer Portal](https://discord.com/developers/applications) and create the bot yourself. 
Once your bot is made you can go into the mod config and paste your bot token along with the channel Id of the channel you want to link to the server.
To generate the config files you need to edit you'll have to run the server with the mod. It will crash on the first load but once you've pasted the minimum information required for the mod to work into the config it will load correctly.
If the mod still crashes after inserting the proper information please check that you've configured your bot in the [Discord Developer Portal](https://discord.com/developers/applications) with the correct permissions.
